title: PPG to announce fourth-quarter and full-year 2023 results Jan. 18
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced the following details for its fourth-quarter 2023 earnings release and teleconference call. title: PPG recognized in Newsweek's America's Most Responsible Companies list for fourth consecutive year
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that it has been named to Newsweek magazine's America's Most Responsible Companies list for the fourth consecutive year. Thousands of companies were considered for the 2024 list, which recognizes the 600 most responsible companies in the United States across 14 industry subcategories. “PPG is proud to be included within this prestigious list,” said Diane Kappas, PPG vice president, global sustainability. “We are committed to driving in.
